description.p: Open Audio Tools is a powerful tool (in my opinion) that is designed to break down your voice (not literally) into its parameters, helping you understand how it works and what you can change
This app was created by and is especially designed for trans women

So, in our app, you have a lot of graphs of different parameters and a HUGE RECORD BUTTON. Don't hesitate — press the record button and speak; our app will analyze your voice and make graphs of your voice parameters IN REAL TIME. If you want to feminize your voice, for example, you can choose the tab named "Feminine Voice." You will see the target zones on the graphs. You need to hold your voice parameters inside the target zones while you are speaking. Try your best, and you will see results. That's how it works

So, as I already said, the app gives you OBJECTIVE FEEDBACK in REAL TIME. This is something that humans are not really capable of, tbh. You will always know the clanker's opinion on your voice with good precision. This is COOL

Also, this app can measure RESONANCE. (Resonance is not Pitch.) Resonance is how your voice vibrates, and achieving the right resonance is very important for feminization. If you have a high pitch, but your voice sounds SUS and you don't know why ⇾ that's probably the wrong resonance. So this app can help you upgrade your voice from SUS to YAY
No!, it's not too much!. I believe in you!! You can understand all of this!^
I am Ketaslava Ket. My team, KTVINCCO, and I have created this app, so ENJOY!!!
— Also, subscribe to my channel btw, I'm making good stuff
Idk what to say here, so I asked AI, and the clanker said that our goal is to empower you with the tools and knowledge to transform your voice into its best version

If you read all this text and are still not convinced that this application is worth installing, then I'm gonna cry, IG, because I am making my project for the people, not for clankers. If you have any suggestions or ideas to improve it, or any other question, you can contact us any time!! I'm waiting 4 U ...
